title: MediaPlan
description: Confirmed media clip selections, written by the VC editor Media tab and read by render_video.py and media_preview_pack.py.

shot_overrides.description: Ordered list of media segments. Sequential order is play order — no start_sec/end_sec on items.

type.description: Media type: 'image' for still frames, 'video' for motion clips.

url.description: Remote URL of the media asset.

path.description: Local filesystem path to the downloaded media asset. null if not yet downloaded.

clip_id.description: Assigned clip identifier. null if not yet assigned.

hold_sec.description: Image only. Duration to hold this still frame (seconds).

animation_type.description: Image only. Pan/zoom animation style applied to the still (e.g. 'none', 'ken_burns').

clip_in.description: Video only. Trim in-point within the source clip (seconds).

clip_out.description: Video only. Trim out-point within the source clip (seconds). null = play to natural end.

duration_sec.description: Rendered duration of this segment (seconds). null = derive from clip or hold_sec.
